issue_summary: added ability to wait on any Lock. changed write.lock wait to 1 sec from none.
javadoc_before: /** Constructs an executor that will grab the named lock. */
javadoc_after:
/** Constructs an executor that will grab the named lock.
       *  Defaults lockWaitTimeout to Lock.COMMIT_LOCK_TIMEOUT.

       */
